channel.title: Robin Dadswell on PowerShell.org - Welcome Automaters!
channel.description: Recent content in Robin Dadswell on PowerShell.org - Welcome Automaters!

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 22-October-2021
item.description: Topics include Microsoft Graph, PowerShell remoting and more…

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 08-October-2021
item.description: Topics include VMWare, Windows 11, Web Reports and more… Special thanks to Robin Dadswell, Prasoon Karunan V, Kiran Patnayakuni and Kevin Laux How to gather your vCenter inventory data with this VMware PowerShell script by Scott Matteson on 7th October Inventory reports are a common request when administering a VMware vCenter environment. Learn how this VMware PowerShell script can make such requests quick and easy Building a Web Report in PowerShell, use the -Force Luke by Chris Noring on 8th October

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 03-September-2021
item.description: Topics include O365, SQL, Code Formatting and more… Special thanks to Robin Dadswell, Prasoon Karunan V, Kiran Patnayakuni and Kevin Laux Automating with PowerShell: Setting up application consent by Kelvin Tegelaar on 29th August In this post you will learn two things about 0365 application consent: how to setup the OAuth consent workflow and how to monitor for application requests. Easy way to connect to FTPS and SFTP using PowerShell by Przemyslaw Klys on 29th August

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 16-July-2021
item.description: Topics include Azure Devops, Microsoft Defender, Azure and more…

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 09-July-2021
item.description: Topics include Exchange Migrations, APIs, PrintNightmare and more…

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 02-July-2021
item.description: Topics include Monitoring Azure, Filtering objects, Generating SQL reports and more… Special thanks to Robin Dadswell, Prasoon Karunan V, Kiran Patnayakuni and Kevin Laux From SQL to Excel with PowerShell by Jeff Hill on 30th June Learn to pull data from SQL and generate reports for your manager using PowerShell. *[error 0x800700c1 when launching `C:\Program Files\PowerShell\7\pwsh.exe’]* by Darren Robinson on 30th June How to fix an issue after updating Windows Teminal.

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 18-June-2021
item.description: Topics include Password Auditing, PowerShell 7.2, WiFi Password Recovery and more…

item.description: Topics include BluebirdPS, Scripting Challenge, Wifi and WMI

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 04-June-2021
item.description: Topics include AD, Azure AD,  Debugging and more…

item.description: Topics include PowerBI SQL, Exchange online and more

item.description: Topics include Pester, AD, Chrome and more…

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 30-April-2021
item.description:
Topics include SendAs, Intune, Hyper-V, Secrets Management and more…

Special thanks to Robin Dadswell, Prasoon Karunan V, Kiran Patnayakuni and Kevin Laux.

item.description: Topics include Script signing, Item Insights Security via Graph, Microsoft Learn and more…

item.description: Topics include Azure Functions, Default Parameters, AWS, Text to Speech and more…

item.description: Topics include PowerShell profiles, Parameter defaults, ARM and more…

item.description: Topics include help sections, Approved Verbs, Identity Management and more…

item.description: Topics include PoshGUI, Foreach-Parallel, Azure CLI and more…

item.description: Topics include DSC, Active Directory, Compare-Object and more…

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 12-March-2021
item.description: Topics include logging, converting PowerShell scripts to executables, PSJobs with VMWare and more…

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 05-March-2021
item.description: Topics include REST APIs, PSRemoting, Azure AD reporting and more…

item.description: Topics include DNS, VMWare, Exchange and more…

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 12-February-2021
item.description: Topics include Microsoft Cloud Services, Dynamic parameters, PSRemoting, jobs and more…

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 29-January-2021
item.description: Topics include PSRemoting, Active Directory, string manipulation and more..

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 22-January-2021
item.description: Topics include GitHub Actions, Linux, SharePoint and more…

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 15-January-2021
item.description: Topics include PowerShell 7.1, SharePoint Online, WPF and more…

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 08-January-2021
item.description: Topics include Phishing, DSC, Regex and more… Special thanks to Robin Dadswell, Prasoon Karunan V, Kiran Patnayakuni and Kevin Laux Set Windows Timezone via Location Services by Dan Tsekahnskiy on 4th January This post aims to help those of you trying to set the Windows time zone without relying on DHCP options or similar solutions. Getting Started with PowerShell and Regex by Christopher Bisset on 5th January In this article, you’re going to learn the basics of working with regex and PowerShell.

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 18-December-2020
item.description: Topics include NuGet feeds, Azure, OpenSSH, PowerShell 7.2 and more…

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 11-December-2020
item.description: Topics include Graph, DateTimes, JSON, Crescendo and more…

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 27-November-2020 & 04-December-2020
item.description: Topics include Secret Santa, Microsoft Graph, NAS devices and more.. Special thanks to Robin Dadswell, Prasoon Karunan V, Kiran Patnayakuni and Kevin Laux. Powershell Secret Santa, sent via Android SMS by Jack Mallender on 25th November Sending SMS via Android using Powershell. Microsoft Graph API PowerShell AzureAD App by edemilliere on 29th November Today we’ll talk about the Microsoft Graph API, PowerShell & AzureAD application. As you may know, the Microsoft Graph API is the data source where you can find everything about Office 365 and everything that’s interacting with it.

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 20-November-2020
item.description: Topics include Splatting, Print Servers, Active Directory and more…

item.description: Topics include Containers, Microsoft Teams, AMSI and more

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 30-October-2020
item.description: Topics include SQL, Teams Webhooks, Zombie Files and more…

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 23-October-2020
item.description: Topics include web forms, converting to PDF, Oracle Cloud Infrastructure and more…

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 16-October-2020
item.description: Topics include DSC, AD Recycle Bin, Pester and more…

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 09-October-2020
item.description: Topics include GitHub actions, Azure Functions, WVD, Pentesting and more! Special thanks to Robin Dadswell, Prasoon Karunan V, Kiran Patnayakuni and Kevin Laux. Using GitHub actions to run automatic Pester tests by Roberth Strand on 4th October But as soon as I started creating PowerShell modules that was more than just small time projects, I had to step up the production quality. As soon as I had written some tests, I wanted to have those tests run every time I did a pull request.

item.description: Topics include WPF, Azure, Secrets and more…

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 17-July-2020
item.description: Topics include OneDrive client, HTML reports, Beautiful code and more… Special thanks to Robin Dadswell, Prasoon Karunan V, Kiran Patnayakuni and Kevin Laux Automate Azure update management scheduling with PowerShell by Barbara Forbes on 12th July Barbara is explaining about how to automate Azure update management and scheduling updates using PowerShell Active Directory DHCP Report to HTML or EMAIL with zero HTML knowledge by Przemyslaw Klys on 12th July Przemyslaw is using PSWriteHTML module and and demonstrating how to generate html reports seamlessly.

item.description: Topics include Mother’s day scripts, securing credentials, new PS7 behaviors and more…

item.description: Topics include Azure functions, Windows Performance, O365 and more…

item.description: Topics include Azure, GPOs, Bits and more…

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 03-April-2020
item.description: Topics include Windows Terminal, Event Logs, String Basics and more. Special thanks to Robin Dadswell, Prasoon Karunan V, Kiran Patnayakuni and Kevin Laux Dynamic PowerShell and SSH remoting tabs for Windows Terminal by Luke on 29th March I am a SysAdmin and have to connect to dozen of different computers every day, I needed to bring this a little further and make it more “dynamic”: every time I open a remoting tab, it should ask for the computer name and the username if necessary.

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 27-March-2020
item.description: Topics include Switch Statements, Try Catch, Python and more… Special thanks to Robin Dadswell, Prasoon Karunan V, Kiran Patnayakuni and Kevin Laux Use cases for the new null coalescing operator in PowerShell 7 by Luc on 22nd March Tips and use cases for the new null coalescing operator in PowerShell 7. Getting into Python by Referencing PowerShell by @SOZDBA on 23rd March Trying to break his PowerShell dependency Shane shares an example for a script he wrote in both Python and PowerShell.

item.description: Topics include Select-String, Should Process, PowerShell Summit and more…

item.description: Topics include Splatting, PS7 Experimental features, VSCode and more…

item.description: Topics include Subexpression, For Loops, Hyper-V and more

item.description: Topics include Azure Monitor Logs, Office 365 Mailbox sizes, Brackets and more.

item.description: Topics include reinstalling Windows Store Apps, Auditing Computers, PowerShell 7 and more.

item.description: In the first ICYMI of 2020 the topics include: working with PDFs, AD Users, Remote Computers and more…

item.description: Topics include: Automating Excel, Customizing your profile, a New Year’s module and more…

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 20-December-2019
item.description: Topics include New PowerShell in the old ISE, Azure DevOps, Automating Twitter, and Searching Bing with PowerShell to creat a Word Cloud.

item.description: Topics include Functions, String, Certificate Management and more.

item.description: Topics include Hyper-V, IIS, Ternary Operators and more.

item.description: Topics include Invoke-Command, Objects, Introspection and more.

item.description: Topics include Group-Object, Power Platform, Preview 6 and more.

item.description: Topics include string manipulation, bash, Python and Slack applications.

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 8-November-2019
item.description: Topics include speeding up the pipeline, while/until loops, why you shouldn’t use += and more!

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 1-November-2019
item.description: Topics include Teams, Scheduled Jobs, Halloween fun and more

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 25-October-2019
item.description: Topics include RepAdmin, Certificates and Testing Teams connections.

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 18-October-2019
item.description: Topics include idempotency, Jenkins, PowerShell for beginners and more.

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 11-October-2019
item.description: Topics include PowerShell GUIs, New PS 7 features and more

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 4-October-2019
item.description: Topics include PowerShell GUIs, Azure, Exchange and more.

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 27-September-2019
item.description: Topics include emojis, orchestration, 365 storage, ternary operators, bash and more.

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 20-September-2019
item.description: Topics include Active Directory, Azure Labs, Ansible, PowerShell 7 Preview 4 and more.

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 13-September-2019
item.description: Topics include Active Directory, SCCM, Security and More.

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 6-September-2019
item.description: Topics include PowerShell meetups, Network Connections, PowerShell on Android, Regex and more.

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 30-August-2019
item.description: Topics include DNS, GUI’s, automation of legacy tools, Azure test environment setups and more!

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 23-August-2019
item.description: Topics include PowerShell 7 Preview 3, Universal Dashboard, URI Data Types and more.

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 16-August-2019
item.description: Topics include Azure setups, AD reporting, IF statements Out-GridView and other new features coming in PowerShell 7. Special thanks to James Petty, Mark Rollof, Prasoon Karunan V and Robin Dadswell Pragmatic PowerShell Scripting - Reporting on AD Groups by Chris Sharp on 11th August Learn how Chris approached a requirement to pull various reports from AD using PowerShell and a useful Excel module. Powershell: Everything you wanted to know about the IF statement

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 9-August-2019
item.description: Topics include SharePoint, AD trust relationships, Azure File Sync, working with variables and more.

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 2-August-2019
item.description: Topics include data aggregation, file permission migrations, checking reboots in the registry, credential management, default parameters and setting up for PowerShell Development.

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 12-July-2019
item.description: Topics include WPF GUIs, BitLocker and LAPS reporting, more APIs, and tips from a consultant.

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 21-June-2019
item.description: Topics include security tools, security fixes, operation validation and module updates and open source UI creation.

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 3-May-2019
item.description: Topics include GUI development, Azure Cloud Shell, Live streaming, Azure functions and more!

item.title: ICYMI: Week of 18-January-2018
item.description:
ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 18-January-2019

Topics include SQL Server Errors, Out Verbs, Out-Grid in PS Core, Puzzles, Drawing with PowerShell and more.

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 21-December-2018
item.description: Topics include Group-Object, the Azure Module, Windows Forms and Teams membership.
